findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean:50` proves `private theorem fixingSubgroup_univ_of_faithful {G α : Type*} [Group G] [MulAction G α] [FaithfulSMul G α]`, and line 104 exports only the diffeomorphism instance.
findings.fix: Move/publicize the generic lemma with signature `{G α} [Group G] [MulAction G α] [FaithfulSMul G α] : fixingSubgroup G (Set.univ : Set α) = ⊥` in generic group-action API, then derive this specialization from it if needed.
findings.issue: `Diffeomorph.fixingSubgroup_univ` exposes only the diffeomorphism specialization of a theorem the file proves generically for any faithful action.

findings.evidence: PR theorem at `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean:114`; generic theorem confirmed at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/SubMulAction/OfFixingSubgroup.lean:524`, `theorem MulAction.fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer (s : Set α) : fixingSubgroup G s ≤ stabilizer G s`.
findings.fix: Remove this wrapper and use `MulAction.fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer` directly, or only add a wrapper if it provides genuinely diffeomorphism-specific notation or content.
findings.issue: `Diffeomorph.fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer` is a diffeomorphism-specific duplicate of an existing generic theorem, without changing the statement beyond specializing the action.

summary: The relative diffeomorphism wrapper is at the intended level, but two exported facts are still at the wrong API level: one hides a generic faithful-action theorem inside a diffeomorphism file, and one duplicates an existing generic stabilizer theorem.
